_cite.reason: Span re-point (item 3): fact_span_not_in_source FACT whose span is verbatim in another pool source — re-point search_result_id/source_id/tier to the source that contains it. Deterministic, no LLM. Operator ruling 2026-07-04.

prior.claim_text: The Commission's December 2025 Automotive Package proposes to allow manufacturers to accumulate credits as soon as their CO₂ emissions fall below their annual target — broadening credit generation beyond the current linear trajectory threshold.
prior.source_span: The proposed targeted amendment allows manufacturers to collect more emission credits in the years before 2030 than in the current Regulation. While the Regulation (EU) 2019/1242 on CO 2 emission standards for HDVs currently allows manufacturers to gain credits only when their CO 2 emissions are below a linear emissions reduction trajectory, with the proposal they would be able to generate credits as soon as their CO 2 emissions are below their annual emission target.
